task.title: Analyze Current Codebase State & Define Next Phases
task.context:
Comprehensive PRDs completed on March 14, 2026: Tech stack, competitors, target audience, features, frontend PRD (23 screens), backend PRD (25 tables + 25 API endpoints), database PRD (complete schema).
Current session (March 16, 2026): Service library research complete (556 services across 19 industries), regional multipliers documented, discrepancy resolved (keep 556), onboarding system designed for Phase 3.
Need to: Analyze actual Pocket.HQ codebase (https://github.com/one7L/Pocket.HQ.git) against PRD specifications, identify gaps, define next development phases.
task.existing_prds:
## March 14, 2026 - Complete PRDs
### CodeSpring Components (4/4 Complete)
1. **Tech Stack** ✅ - React Native (Expo SDK 51+) - EAS Build (iOS App Store + Google Play Store) - Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, Realtime, Storage) - Stripe integration + manual payments - Role-Based Access Control (Admin, Team Lead, Helper)
2. **Competitor Features** ✅ - 9 competitors analyzed: ServiceTitan, Jobber, Housecall Pro, LMN, JobNimbus, ArborNote, ColorSnap, Contractor Foreman, Plumbing Pro - 10 unique differentiators identified
3. **Target Audience** ✅ - 4 customer segments: Solo, Small, Medium, Growing - ICP persona: "Sarah Service Business Owner" - 10 pain points documented - 7 value propositions
4. **Features** ✅ - 10 categories: Authentication, CRM, Estimates, Scheduling, Team, Time Tracking, Invoicing, Change Orders, Materials/Inventory, Admin - 48 total features (40 MVP, 5 Phase 2, 3 Phase 3) - Complete workflow documented
### PRDs (3/3 Complete)
5. **Frontend PRD** ✅ - 23 screens + 3 modals + 1 component - File-based routing (Expo Router) - State management (Zustand) - Component library
6. **Backend PRD** ✅ - 25 database tables - 25 API endpoints - RLS policies for company isolation - Stripe Edge Functions
7. **Database PRD** ✅ - Complete schema with ERD - 18 indexes for performance - Migration strategy - Testing strategy
## Current Session (March 16, 2026)
8. **Service Library Research** ✅ - 556 services across 19 industries - Regional multipliers: NE 1.15, SE 0.92, SW 1.025, MW 1.00, NW 1.135 - Database schema updated (multi-region columns) - Import complete (556 services)
9. **Onboarding System Design** ✅ - 5 batch categories designed - Per-batch service selection - In-house/subcontractor toggle per service - Progress tracking designed - Template system designed
task.instructions:
## Task: Analyze Codebase & Define Next Phases
### Step 1: Analyze Pocket.HQ Codebase Structure
Access: https://github.com/one7L/Pocket.HQ.git
Analyze:
1. **Project Structure** - Frontend directory: React Native, Expo? - Backend directory: Supabase functions? - Database migrations: Present? - Routing: Configured? - State management: Implemented?
2. **Frontend Implementation Status** - Screens implemented: Count and list - Screens pending: Count and list - Navigation: File-based or app-based? - Authentication: Supabase Auth integrated? - State management: Zustand implemented?
3. **Backend Implementation Status** - Supabase project: Configured? - Database tables: Which ones created? - API endpoints: Which ones implemented? - RLS policies: Applied? - Stripe integration: Connected?
4. **Service Library Integration** - master_service_library table: Exists with 556 services? - Regional pricing columns: Present? - Indexes: Created? - Industry templates: Implemented?
5. **Authentication System** - Signup flow: Implemented? - Login flow: Implemented? - Role-based access: Implemented? - Company profile: Created?
6. **Gap Analysis** - Compare PRD specifications to actual implementation - Identify what's missing - Identify what's partially implemented - Identify what's complete
### Step 2: Create Implementation Status Report
Create: docs/research/CODEBASE_IMPLEMENTATION_STATUS.md
Format: ```markdown # Codebase Implementation Status Report
## Frontend Status
### Screens Implemented [List screens that exist]
### Screens Pending [List screens from PRD that don't exist]
### Infrastructure Status - Routing: [Implemented/Not implemented] - State Management: [Implemented/Not implemented] - Component Library: [Implemented/Not implemented] - Supabase Auth: [Integrated/Not integrated]
## Backend Status
### Database Tables Created [List tables that exist]
### Database Tables Pending [List tables from PRD that don't exist]
### API Endpoints Implemented [List endpoints that exist]
### API Endpoints Pending [List endpoints from PRD that don't exist]
### RLS Policies Applied [List policies that exist]
### RLS Policies Pending [List policies from PRD that don't exist]
### Stripe Integration - Status: [Integrated/Not integrated] - Edge Functions: [Created/Not created]
## Service Library Integration
### master_service_library Table - Status: [Exists/Not exists] - Services Loaded: [556/Pending] - Regional Columns: [Present/Not present] - Indexes: [Created/Not created]
## Gap Analysis
### Major Gaps [List critical missing components]
### Minor Gaps [List non-critical missing components]
### Implementation Priority [Rank gaps by priority: High/Medium/Low] ```
### Step 3: Define Next Development Phases
Based on gap analysis, define next phases:
**Phase 1: Foundation Setup (if not complete)** - Supabase project setup - Database migrations - RLS policies - Stripe integration
**Phase 2: Authentication & User Management (if not complete)** - Signup flow - Login flow - Company profile - Role-based access
**Phase 3: Service Library Integration (if not complete)** - Import 556 services - Regional pricing system - Industry templates - Service selection UI
**Phase 4: Onboarding System (if not complete)** - Batch selection (5 categories) - Service selection - In-house/subcontractor toggle - Template configuration - Progress tracking
**Phase 5: Core Features (CRM, Estimates)** - Client management - Estimate creation - Proposal generation
**Phase 6: Advanced Features (Jobs, Time Tracking, Invoicing)** - Job scheduling - Time tracking - Change orders - Invoicing
**Phase 7: Testing & Deployment** - End-to-end testing - EAS build - App Store submission - Play Store submission
### Step 4: Create Phase Planning Document
Create: docs/research/NEXT_PHASES_PLAN.md
Format: ```markdown # Next Phases Plan - PocketHQ Development
## Current State
Codebase Status: [Analyzed in Step 1] Gaps Identified: [Analyzed in Step 2]
## Phase 1: Foundation Setup
Status: [Ready to Start/In Progress/Complete]
Tasks: - [ ] Supabase project setup - [ ] Database migrations (25 tables) - [ ] RLS policies (company isolation) - [ ] Stripe integration
Timeline: 1 week
Success Criteria: - All 25 tables created - RLS policies applied - Stripe connected
## Phase 2: Authentication & User Management
Status: [Not Started]
Tasks: - [ ] Signup flow (full name, email, phone, company, region) - [ ] Login flow - [ ] Company profile creation - [ ] Role-based access (Admin, Team Lead, Helper)
Timeline: 1 week
Success Criteria: - Users can signup - Users can login - Company profiles created - Roles enforced
## Phase 3: Service Library Integration
Status: [Not Started]
Tasks: - [ ] Import 556 services to master_service_library - [ ] Regional pricing UI (5 regions) - [ ] Industry templates system - [ ] Service selection interface - [ ] In-house/subcontractor toggle
Timeline: 1 week
Success Criteria: - 556 services accessible - Regional pricing working - Templates configured - Selection functional
## Phase 4: Onboarding System
Status: [Not Started]
Tasks: - [ ] Batch selection (5 categories) - [ ] Per-batch service selection - [ ] Progress tracking (circular button) - [ ] Template configuration - [ ] Completion state detection
Timeline: 2 weeks
Success Criteria: - Users can select batches - Users can select services - Progress tracked - Templates configured
## Phase 5: Core Features
Status: [Not Started]
Tasks: - [ ] Client management (add, edit, delete) - [ ] Estimate creation (services + sub items) - [ ] Proposal generation (PDF) - [ ] Send proposals (email, messages)
Timeline: 2 weeks
Success Criteria: - Client CRUD working - Estimates created - Proposals generated - Sending functional
## Phase 6: Advanced Features
Status: [Not Started]
Tasks: - [ ] Job scheduling - [ ] Time tracking (clock in/out) - [ ] Change orders (material, labor, equipment, overhead) - [ ] Invoicing (generate from jobs) - [ ] Materials tracking (inventory depletion)
Timeline: 2 weeks
Success Criteria: - Jobs scheduled - Time tracked - Change orders created - Invoices generated - Materials tracked
## Phase 7: Testing & Deployment
Status: [Not Started]
Tasks: - [ ] End-to-end testing (all workflows) - [ ] EAS build configuration - [ ] iOS App Store submission - [ ] Google Play Store submission
Timeline: 1 week
Success Criteria: - All workflows tested - EAS build successful - App Store approved - Play Store approved
## Overall Timeline
Phase 1: 1 week Phase 2: 1 week Phase 3: 1 week Phase 4: 2 weeks Phase 5: 2 weeks Phase 6: 2 weeks Phase 7: 1 week
**Total: 10 weeks**
## Priority Order
1. Phase 1: Foundation Setup (blocking) 2. Phase 2: Authentication & User Management (blocking) 3. Phase 3: Service Library Integration (blocking) 4. Phase 4: Onboarding System (high priority) 5. Phase 5: Core Features (high priority) 6. Phase 6: Advanced Features (medium priority) 7. Phase 7: Testing & Deployment (critical for launch) ```
### Step 5: Push Documentation to GitHub
Create: docs/research/PHASE_PLANNING_COMPLETE.md
Content: ```markdown # Phase Planning Complete
## Analysis Complete
- Codebase implementation status: [See CODEBASE_IMPLEMENTATION_STATUS.md] - Gap analysis: [See CODEBASE_IMPLEMENTATION_STATUS.md] - Next phases defined: [See NEXT_PHASES_PLAN.md]
## Ready for Development
Status: READY
Next Step: Begin Phase 1 (Foundation Setup)
## Files Created
1. CODEBASE_IMPLEMENTATION_STATUS.md 2. NEXT_PHASES_PLAN.md 3. PHASE_PLANNING_COMPLETE.md ```
Commit changes: ```bash git add docs/research/CODEBASE_IMPLEMENTATION_STATUS.md docs/research/NEXT_PHASES_PLAN.md docs/research/PHASE_PLANNING_COMPLETE.md git commit -m "Phase planning complete: Codebase analysis, gap analysis, next phases defined" git push origin master ```
task.success_criteria: - Pocket.HQ codebase accessed and analyzed (structure, frontend, backend, database) - Implementation status report created (CODEBASE_IMPLEMENTATION_STATUS.md) - Gap analysis complete (what's implemented vs. what's missing) - Next phases defined (7 phases with tasks, timelines, success criteria) - Phase planning document created (NEXT_PHASES_PLAN.md) - Overall timeline estimated (10 weeks) - Priority order established - Documentation committed and pushed to GitHub

phase.title: Foundation Setup
phase.prerequisites: Codebase analysis complete, gap analysis complete, phases planned
